name: looptimal
description: Turns an objective into a delivered, VERIFIED OUTCOME: frames a hash-pinned sealed acceptance suite, designs the right loop (the loop-design wizard, formerly LoopPrint), war-games it forward, executes with dynamic domain-expert sub-agents (maker != checker), and gates completion on a separate verifier re-running the sealed suite against live state. Outcome-based, not task-completion.
